feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Red and Antman reached Route 25 after Misty reopened the path beyond Cerulean.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill invited Antman inside the Sea Cottage to compare WorldLink readings against his storage network.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill found impossible storage metadata: Pokemon from distant regions are leaving matching traces before those routes are open.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: First Nexus network decode logged. The signal is not a teleport path; it is a living map beneath the regions.
